query: SELECT status, currentNode, progress, error, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_assets WHERE pipelineRunId = 150009 AND assetType = 'video_clip') as videoClips, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_assets WHERE pipelineRunId = 150009 AND assetType = 'final_video') as finalVideos, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_assets WHERE pipelineRunId = 150009) as totalAssets FROM pipeline_runs WHERE id = 150009
